message:
fix(flow_lattice): add declassified label flow-to-target check and update test fixtures to use Label::Public

Adds a missing flow validation step in Ir2FlowLattice::apply_declassification:
the declassified label from the receipt's sink_clearance must be checked against
the obligation's target_clearance via can_flow_to(), preventing a receipt that
declassifies to Label::Internal from satisfying an obligation targeting
Label::Public.

Updates ifc_declassification_runtime tests to use Label::Public as the target
clearance (was Label::Internal), ensuring the new check is exercised. Extracts
RUNTIME_ROUTE_ID constant and simplifies make_request() to remove the now-
unnecessary route_id parameter. Fixes import ordering for SIGNATURE_SENTINEL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
